description_long: This axe features a dramatic, fantasy-inspired double-bladed head with jagged, asymmetrical edges and a dark metallic finish. The blade is adorned with glowing blue runic patterns and intricate cutouts, giving it a mystical and ornamental appearance. The central section of the blade is reinforced and merges into a robust, faceted socket that connects to the handle. The handle is wrapped in a textured, dark grip with metallic accents at both ends, providing a secure hold. The overall design is aggressive and stylized, suggesting ceremonial or decorative use as much as practical function. The axe's imposing silhouette and detailed craftsmanship make it a striking object, likely to stand out in any urban or fantasy-themed environment.
description: A stylized, double-bladed axe with jagged edges, glowing blue runes, and a dark, textured handle. The design is ornate and fantasy-inspired, with a robust and aggressive appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full double-bladed head with blue runes and the symmetrical, jagged blade edges.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the thin profile of the blade and the cylindrical, textured handle.
description_view_2: Rear view highlights the back of the blade, showing the mirrored jagged design and runic details.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays the handle's grip texture and the blade's thickness.
attribute_handle_type: Straight, cylindrical handle with a dark, ribbed grip, likely leather-wrapped, with metallic end caps and a faceted pommel.
attribute_blade_design: Double-bladed, asymmetrical axe head with jagged, ornamental edges, glowing blue runic engravings, and decorative cutouts.
attribute_mounting_style: Modern composite mounting with the blade socketed and reinforced onto the handle.
